사무엘상 30:1.content: When David and his men had come to Ziklag on the third day, the Amalekites had made a raid on the South, and on Ziklag, and had struck Ziklag, and burned it with fire,

사무엘상 30:2.content: and had taken captive the women and all who were in it, both small and great. They didn’t kill any, but carried them off, and went their way.

사무엘상 30:3.content: When David and his men came to the city, behold, it was burned with fire; and their wives, their sons, and their daughters were taken captive.

사무엘상 30:4.content: Then David and the people who were with him lifted up their voice and wept until they had no more power to weep.

사무엘상 30:5.content: David’s two wives were taken captive, Ahinoam the Jezreelitess, and Abigail the wife of Nabal the Carmelite.

사무엘상 30:6.content: David was greatly distressed; for the people spoke of stoning him, because the souls of all the people were grieved, every man for his sons and for his daughters; but David strengthened himself in Yahweh his God.

사무엘상 30:7.content: David said to Abiathar the priest, the son of Ahimelech, “Please bring the ephod here to me.” Abiathar brought the ephod to David.

사무엘상 30:8.content: David inquired of Yahweh, saying, “If I pursue after this troop, will I overtake them?” He answered him, “Pursue; for you will surely overtake them, and will without fail recover all.”

사무엘상 30:9.content: So David went, he and the six hundred men who were with him, and came to the brook Besor, where those who were left behind stayed.

사무엘상 30:10.content: But David pursued, he and four hundred men; for two hundred stayed behind, who were so faint that they couldn’t go over the brook Besor.

사무엘상 30:11.content: They found an Egyptian in the field, and brought him to David, and gave him bread, and he ate; and they gave him water to drink.

사무엘상 30:12.content: They gave him a piece of a cake of figs, and two clusters of raisins. When he had eaten, his spirit came again to him; for he had eaten no bread, and drank no water for three days and three nights.

사무엘상 30:13.content: David asked him, “To whom do you belong? Where are you from?” He said, “I am a young man of Egypt, servant to an Amalekite; and my master left me, because three days ago I got sick.

사무엘상 30:14.content: We made a raid on the South of the Cherethites, and on that which belongs to Judah, and on the South of Caleb; and we burned Ziklag with fire.”

사무엘상 30:15.content: David said to him, “Will you bring me down to this troop?” He said, “Swear to me by God that you will not kill me and not deliver me up into the hands of my master, and I will bring you down to this troop.”

사무엘상 30:16.content: When he had brought him down, behold, they were spread around over all the ground, eating, drinking, and dancing, because of all the great plunder that they had taken out of the land of the Philistines, and out of the land of Judah.

사무엘상 30:17.content: David struck them from the twilight even to the evening of the next day. Not a man of them escaped from there, except four hundred young men, who rode on camels and fled.

사무엘상 30:18.content: David recovered all that the Amalekites had taken, and David rescued his two wives.

사무엘상 30:19.content: There was nothing lacking to them, neither small nor great, neither sons nor daughters, neither plunder, nor anything that they had taken to them. David brought back all.

사무엘상 30:20.content: David took all the flocks and the herds, which they drove before those other livestock, and said, “This is David’s plunder.”

사무엘상 30:21.content: David came to the two hundred men, who were so faint that they could not follow David, whom also they had made to stay at the brook Besor; and they went out to meet David, and to meet the people who were with him. When David came near to the people, he greeted them.

사무엘상 30:22.content: Then all the wicked men and worthless fellows, of those who went with David, answered and said, “Because they didn’t go with us, we will not give them anything of the plunder that we have recovered, except to every man his wife and his children, that he may lead them away, and depart.”

사무엘상 30:23.content: Then David said, “Do not do so, my brothers, with that which Yahweh has given to us, who has preserved us, and delivered the troop that came against us into our hand.

사무엘상 30:24.content: Who will listen to you in this matter? For as his share is who goes down to the battle, so shall his share be who stays with the baggage. They shall share alike.”

사무엘상 30:25.content: It was so from that day forward, that he made it a statute and an ordinance for Israel to this day.

사무엘상 30:26.content: When David came to Ziklag, he sent some of the plunder to the elders of Judah, even to his friends, saying, “Behold, a present for you from the plunder of Yahweh’s enemies.”

사무엘상 30:27.content: He sent it to those who were in Bethel, to those who were in Ramoth of the South, to those who were in Jattir,

사무엘상 30:28.content: to those who were in Aroer, to those who were in Siphmoth, to those who were in Eshtemoa,

사무엘상 30:29.content: to those who were in Racal, to those who were in the cities of the Jerahmeelites, to those who were in the cities of the Kenites,

사무엘상 30:30.content: to those who were in Hormah, to those who were in Borashan, to those who were in Athach,

사무엘상 30:31.content: to those who were in Hebron, and to all the places where David himself and his men used to stay.
